title: RivalTheoryResult
description: Comparison of a fixture's classification across rival theories of consciousness. Used to identify where theories diverge, overclassify, or underclassify. None of the theories evaluated here are claimed to be correct.

case_id.description: ID of the fixture being evaluated across theories.

rival_classifications.description: How each rival theory classifies this case. Values are classification strings plus a rationale.

divergence_points.description: Cases where two or more theories disagree on classification. These are the most informative fixtures.

overclassification_flags.description: Theories that incorrectly promote this case to phenomenal status.

underclassification_flags.description: Theories that incorrectly demote a plausible phenomenal candidate.

which_theory_handles_branching_best.description: For transfer/copy cases: which theory gives the clearest account of branching failure?

which_theory_gives_clearest_falsifiers.description: Which theory produces the most testable, falsifiable predictions for this case?

rationale.description: Why this theory produces this verdict for this case.

failure_mode.description: If verdict is overclassifies or underclassifies, what specifically goes wrong?
